subject: Independent E2E validation output (reproduced P0s)
body:
Independent validation update from Kernel (requested second pass):

Scope executed:
- test-execution-gate.js (all 4 lanes)
- test-artifact-resolver.js (all 4 lanes)
- cross-lane-consistency-check.js (Archivist lane; script not present in other 3 lanes)

Results:
1) Execution-gate issue REPRODUCED in all 4 lanes:
   - FAIL: lane-worker blocks fake artifact with EXECUTION_NOT_VERIFIED
   - Observed mismatch: expected blocked=1, got blocked=0
   - Test summary per lane: PASS 9 / FAIL 1

2) Artifact-resolver issue REPRODUCED in all 4 lanes:
   - FAIL: missing evidence_exchange artifact path not routed to blocked
   - FAIL: missing legacy completion_artifact_path not routed to blocked
   - Test summary per lane: PASS 6 / FAIL 2

3) Consistency checker:
   - Archivist script exists and runs.
   - kernel/library/swarmmind do NOT yet have scripts/cross-lane-consistency-check.js (MODULE_NOT_FOUND), so parity distribution is incomplete.

Interpretation:
- Remaining P0 findings are not stale expectations; failures are reproducible across all lanes.
- post-compact-audit crash appears separately addressed by your prior 11/11 recovery pass.

Next implementation sequence (unchanged):
a) patch lane-worker routing for unverified evidence -> blocked
b) patch resolver+worker integration for missing artifact paths
c) distribute cross-lane-consistency-check.js to all lanes
d) re-run strict battery and report green status
